description_long: This is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a long, slender metal barrel. The stock is made from a dark, polished wood, featuring a smooth, ergonomic shape for comfortable shoulder placement. The receiver and barrel are constructed from blued or darkened steel, with visible iron sights mounted along the top. The bolt handle is prominent on the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. The rifle has an internal magazine, with no detachable box magazine visible. The overall design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles, with a utilitarian yet robust appearance.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and long metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a prominent bolt handle.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from a slightly elevated angle, highlighting the wooden stock and the length of the barrel, with the bolt handle visible.
description_view_1: A side profile view showing the full length of the rifle, the wooden stock, and the iron sights along the barrel.
description_view_2: A top-down perspective emphasizing the alignment of the barrel and stock, with the bolt handle and iron sights visible.
description_view_3: An angled view from the rear, showcasing the buttstock, bolt handle, and the full length of the barrel.
